files.patch:
@@ -70,2 +70,3 @@ - * Standard over time. Upgrades to newer versions of the Unicode Standard - * occurred in the following Java releases, each indicating the new version: + * Standard over time. The following table lists the version of Unicode used + * in each Java release. Unless otherwise specified, all update releases in a + * given Java release family use the same Unicode version. @@ -73,0 +74,3 @@ + * @@ -81,1 +85,1 @@ - * Java SE 24 + * Java SE 25 @@ -83,3 +87,1 @@ - * Java SE 22 - * Unicode 15.1 - * Java SE 20 + * Java SE 21 @@ -87,2 +89,6 @@ - * Java SE 19 - * Unicode 14.0 + * Java SE 17 + * Unicode 13.0 + * Java SE 11 + * Unicode 10.0 + * Java SE 8 + * Unicode 6.2 @@ -92,1 +98,3 @@ - * Show older Java releases + * Show other Java releases + *

Java releases prior to Java SE 8 are listed only if they upgraded the + * Unicode version

@@ -94,1 +102,2 @@ - * Shows Java releases and supported Unicode versions + * Shows other Java releases and supported Unicode + * versions @@ -100,0 +109,14 @@ + * Java SE 24 + * Unicode 16.0 + * Java SE 23 + * Unicode 15.1 + * Java SE 22 + * Unicode 15.1 + * Java SE 20 + * Unicode 15.0 + * Java SE 19 + * Unicode 14.0 + * Java SE 18 + * Unicode 13.0 + * Java SE 16 + * Unicode 13.0 @@ -102,0 +125,2 @@ + * Java SE 14 + * Unicode 12.1 @@ -106,2 +131,2 @@ - * Java SE 11 - * Unicode 10.0 + * Java SE 10 + * Unicode 8.0 @@ -110,2 +135,0 @@ - * Java SE 8 - * Unicode 6.2 @@ -125,0 +148,1 @@ + *

@@ -178,0 +178,3 @@ + * @@ -188,6 +191,8 @@ - * JDK 24 - * CLDR 46 - * JDK 23 - * CLDR 45 - * JDK 22 - * CLDR 44 + * JDK 21 + * CLDR 43 + * JDK 17 + * CLDR 39 + * JDK 11 + * CLDR 33 + * JDK 8 + * CLDR 21.0.1 @@ -197,1 +202,1 @@ - * Show older JDK releases + * Show other JDK releases @@ -199,1 +204,2 @@ - * JDK releases and supported CLDR versions + * Other JDK releases and supported CLDR + * versions @@ -205,2 +211,6 @@ - * JDK 21 - * CLDR 43 + * JDK 24 + * CLDR 46 + * JDK 23 + * CLDR 45 + * JDK 22 + * CLDR 44 @@ -213,2 +223,0 @@ - * JDK 17 - * CLDR 39 @@ -225,2 +233,0 @@ - * JDK 11 - * CLDR 33 @@ -231,2 +237,0 @@ - * JDK 8 - * CLDR 21.0.1
